User Story: As a borrower, I want to register an account so that I can create a secure account.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can register using mobile number or email
- System sends an OTP to verify the entered mobile number or email
- User must enter the correct OTP within the valid time to continue
- System shows an error if the OTP is incorrect or expired
- System blocks registration if the mobile number or email is already in use
- User's password must meet the minimum security requirements
- Account is created only after successful OTP verification

User Story: As a borrower, I want to reset my password so that I can regain access to my account.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can request a password reset from the login screen
- System sends an OTP to the registered mobile number or email
- User must enter the correct OTP to proceed with the reset
- System shows an error if the OTP is incorrect or expired
- User can set a new password that meets the minimum security requirements
- User is logged out of all other active sessions after a successful reset

User Story: As a borrower, I want to complete my KYC so that my identity can be verified.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can complete KYC by entering Aadhaar number, PAN number, and uploading required documents
- User must upload address proof and income proof as part of KYC
- User must complete a liveness selfie check as part of KYC
- System shows an error if any required KYC field or document is missing
- KYC is marked as submitted only once all required details and documents are provided
- Uploaded documents are securely stored and only accessible to the user and authorised staff

User Story: As a borrower, I want to track the status of my KYC submission so that I know whether my documents have been verified, are pending review, or have been rejected.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view their current KYC status at any time
- KYC status clearly shows whether it is Not Started, In Progress, Submitted, Verified, or Rejected
- Status updates automatically when an officer reviews the KYC documents
- User does not need to refresh or relaunch the app to see the latest status
- If rejected, user can see which specific document caused the rejection

User Story: As a borrower, I want to resubmit specific KYC documents that were rejected so that I can correct my submission and continue the verification process.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view which specific KYC documents were rejected
- User can re-upload only the rejected documents, not the entire KYC
- System replaces the old rejected document with the newly uploaded one
- Resubmitted documents are sent back to the officer for review
- KYC status updates automatically once all rejected documents are resubmitted

User Story: As a borrower, I want to use the EMI calculator to estimate my monthly payment for any loan amount, tenure, and interest rate so that I can make an informed decision before applying.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can access the EMI calculator without logging in
- User can enter any loan amount, tenure, and interest rate
- System calculates and displays the EMI based on the entered values
- System shows the total interest payable and total repayment amount
- EMI updates instantly whenever the user changes any input value

User Story: As a borrower, I want to apply for a new loan so that I can initiate a loan request.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can select a loan type before starting the application
- User can enter the desired loan amount and tenure within the allowed limits
- User can preview the EMI before submitting the application
- User must upload all required documents based on the selected loan type
- System blocks submission if KYC is not completed
- System blocks submission if any required document is missing
- A unique application number is generated once the application is submitted
- User cannot edit the loan amount or tenure after submission

User Story: As a borrower, I want to track my loan application status in real time so that I always know where my application stands.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view the current status of their loan application at any time
- Status clearly shows the stage — Submitted, Under Review, Approved, Disbursed, or Rejected
- Status updates automatically without the user needing to refresh the app
- User can tap on a past stage to see when it was reached

User Story: As a borrower, I want to upload additional documents so that I can provide missing information and allow my application to continue processing.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can upload additional documents only when requested by the loan officer
- System only accepts supported file formats (e.g. PDF, JPG, PNG)
- System shows an error if the file size exceeds the allowed limit
- Officer is notified once the requested document is uploaded
- Application moves forward once all requested documents are submitted

User Story: As a borrower, I want to view the reason my loan application was rejected so that I understand the decision and know what to address before reapplying.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view the reason their loan application was rejected
- Rejection reason is shown exactly as entered by the officer or manager
- This screen is only visible if the application status is Rejected
- User can start a new loan application directly from this screen

User Story: As a borrower, I want to review and respond to remarks when my application is sent back for revision so that I can address the officer's concerns.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view the manager's remarks when an application is sent back for revision
- User can respond to the remarks and/or re-upload the relevant documents
- User can resubmit the application after addressing the remarks
- Application moves back to the loan officer's queue after resubmission

User Story: As a borrower, I want to view my active loan details so that I have full visibility into my current loan.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view their active loan details including disbursement date and amount
- User can view the outstanding principal and interest amount
- User can view the current interest rate applied to the loan
- All loan details shown are read-only and cannot be edited by the user

User Story: As a borrower, I want to view my full EMI details so that I can plan my repayments effectively.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view the complete EMI schedule for their loan
- Each EMI entry shows the due date, amount, and principal/interest breakdown
- Each EMI is clearly marked as Paid, Upcoming, or Overdue
- Overdue EMIs show any applicable penalty amount

User Story: As a borrower, I want to pay my EMI so that I can settle my repayments securely.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can pay an EMI directly through the app
- User can choose to pay via UPI, card, or netbanking
- System shows the exact EMI amount, including any penalty, before payment
- User receives a confirmation once the payment is successfully completed
- System shows a clear status if the payment is still being processed
- EMI status updates to Paid automatically after a successful payment
- Loan status updates to Closed if this was the final EMI

User Story: As a borrower, I want to view my complete payment history so that I can track every repayment.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view their complete payment history
- Each entry shows the date, amount, payment mode, and reference number
- Cash payments and online payments are both shown in the same list
- User can scroll through past payments without performance issues

User Story: As a borrower, I want to download my sanction letter and loan agreement so that I have official documentation of my loan approval and terms.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can download the sanction letter once the loan is approved
- User can download the loan agreement once the loan is disbursed
- Both documents are downloaded as PDF files
- System shows an error if the document is not yet available

User Story: As a borrower, I want to send and receive in-app messages with my assigned loan officer about my application so that all communication is documented in one place.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can send and receive messages with their assigned loan officer
- Messages are linked to the specific loan application
- User receives a notification when the officer replies
- User can view the full message history for that application at any time

User Story: As a borrower, I want to receive push notifications for all key loan events so that I never miss a critical update about my loan.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User receives push notifications for key events such as OTP, KYC status, application updates, and EMI reminders
- User receives a notification when an EMI is due soon and when an EMI is overdue
- User receives a notification when a payment is confirmed
- Tapping a notification takes the user directly to the relevant screen
- All notifications are also available to view inside the app's notification list

User Story: As a borrower, I want to view and update my profile information so that my account details remain accurate.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can update their name, phone number, and address
- System sends an OTP to verify any change to the phone number
- Updated information is saved immediately after confirmation
- System shows an error if the update fails

User Story: As a borrower, I want to view a repayment dashboard showing my upcoming EMI due date, total outstanding balance, overdue amount if any, and a quick Pay button so that I can see my repayment health at a glance and act immediately.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view their next EMI due date and total outstanding balance in one place
- User can view the overdue amount, if any, on the same screen
- A Pay button is shown when an EMI is due or overdue
- Tapping Pay takes the user directly into the payment flow for that EMI

User Story: As a borrower, I want to view my credit score and the bureau it was sourced from so that I can understand my creditworthiness.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can view their current credit score
- User can view which credit bureau the score was sourced from
- System shows a clear message if no credit score is available yet
- Credit score is shown as read-only and cannot be edited by the user

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to log in to the app so that I can access my assigned loan processing functions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can log in using their employee credentials
- System grants access only to the features and data permitted for the loan officer role
- System shows an error for incorrect login credentials
- Officer is logged out automatically after a defined period of inactivity

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to see all my assigned loan applications in a dashboard so that I can identify which ones need action.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can view all loan applications assigned to them in one dashboard
- Applications needing action are clearly highlighted
- Officer can see the applicant name, loan type, amount, and status at a glance
- Dashboard updates automatically when a new application is assigned

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to view the full detail of a loan application so that I can assess all borrower information.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can open any assigned application to view its full details
- Officer can view the applicant's information, requested amount, and purpose
- Officer can view and open all documents uploaded for the application
- All borrower-submitted information is shown as read-only

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to view a borrower's credit score and risk summary so that I can evaluate their creditworthiness before making a recommendation.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can view the borrower's credit score on the application detail screen
- Officer can view a summary of the borrower's credit risk
- System shows a clear message if the credit score is not yet available
- Officer can only view this information for applications assigned to them

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to request additional documents from a borrower so that I can obtain missing information needed to process the application.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can request additional documents from the borrower
- Officer can specify which document(s) are needed
- Officer can add a note explaining the request
- Borrower is notified immediately when a document is requested
- Application is marked as awaiting borrower response until the document is provided

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to review documents resubmitted by a borrower so that I can continue processing the application.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can view documents resubmitted by the borrower
- Officer can mark each document as verified or rejected
- Officer can add a remark if a document is rejected again
- Application moves forward once all requested documents are verified

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to reject an ineligible loan application with a mandatory reason so that the borrower is informed and the decision is permanently recorded.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can reject an ineligible loan application
- System requires a reason before the rejection can be confirmed
- Borrower is notified of the rejection and the reason
- Rejected application is recorded permanently and cannot be edited

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to recommend an eligible loan application to the manager so that it proceeds for final approval.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can recommend an eligible application to the manager
- Recommend option is only available once the officer's review is complete
- Application appears in the manager's queue immediately after recommendation
- Officer cannot recommend the same application more than once

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to receive and review manager send-back remarks so that I can address the gaps and resubmit the application for approval.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can view the manager's remarks when an application is sent back
- Officer can take the necessary action to address the remarks
- Officer can resubmit the application to the manager after addressing the gaps
- Officer is notified as soon as an application is sent back

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to view the manager's decision on a recommended application so that I can take the appropriate next action.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can view the manager's final decision on a recommended application
- Decision clearly shows whether it was Approved, Rejected, or Sent Back
- Officer is notified as soon as the manager makes a decision
- Officer can take the next appropriate action directly from this screen

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to generate and share the loan sanction letter for a manager-approved application so that the borrower receives their official approval document.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can generate the sanction letter once the manager approves the application
- Sanction letter includes the approved loan terms
- Officer can share the sanction letter directly from the app
- Borrower can independently access the same sanction letter from their account

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to send and receive in-app messages with a borrower about their application so that all communication is documented in one place.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can send and receive messages with the borrower about their application
- Messages are linked to the specific loan application
- Officer receives a notification when the borrower sends a new message
- Officer can view the full message history for that application

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to send a message to the manager about a specific loan application so that I can seek clarification on decisions or approvals.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can send a message to the manager about a specific application
- Manager is notified when a new message is received
- Message is linked to the relevant loan application
- Officer can view the full message history with the manager

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to view my assigned portfolio of active loans so that I can monitor the post-disbursement status of borrowers I processed.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can view a list of all active loans they have processed
- Officer can see the current status of each loan at a glance
- Officer can see the outstanding balance for each loan
- List only includes loans the officer personally processed

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to track the repayment status of my assigned borrowers so that I can identify who is on track and who is falling behind.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can view the repayment status of each assigned borrower
- System clearly shows which borrowers are on track and which are falling behind
- Officer can sort or filter the list to identify at-risk borrowers quickly
- Status reflects the latest repayment data available

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to flag overdue borrower accounts so that they are escalated for NPA monitoring before the threshold is reached.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer can flag an overdue borrower account for early NPA monitoring
- Officer must provide a reason when flagging an account
- Flagged accounts are visible to both the officer and their manager
- Flagging does not change the loan's status by itself

User Story: As a loan officer, I want to receive push notifications for all key events on my assigned applications so that I can act promptly without constantly checking the app.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Officer receives push notifications for key events on their assigned applications
- Notifications include new submissions, document resubmissions, and borrower messages
- Officer receives an alert when an assigned loan becomes overdue or reaches NPA
- Tapping a notification takes the officer directly to the relevant application

User Story: As a manager, I want to log in to the app so that I can access data my role permits.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can log in using their employee credentials
- System grants access only to the features and data permitted for the manager role
- System shows an error for incorrect login credentials
- Manager is logged out automatically after a defined period of inactivity

User Story: As a manager, I want to see all officer-recommended loan applications in a prioritised list so that I can work through them.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view all officer-recommended applications in one prioritised list
- List clearly shows the applicant, amount, and recommending officer
- Oldest unactioned applications are surfaced first
- List updates automatically as new recommendations come in

User Story: As a manager, I want to approve a loan application and set the disbursement terms so that the borrower's loan can proceed.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can approve a loan application after reviewing its full details
- Manager can set or adjust the final disbursement amount, tenure, and interest rate
- System requires all terms to be confirmed before approval is finalised
- Application moves to the approved list once confirmed

User Story: As a manager, I want to reject a loan application with a required reason so that the borrower understands the decision and the rejection is auditable.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can reject a loan application
- System requires a reason before the rejection can be confirmed
- Borrower is notified of the rejection and the reason
- Rejected application is recorded permanently

User Story: As a manager, I want to return an application to the officer with specific remarks so that they can address gaps before I make a final decision.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can return an application to the officer for revision
- System requires specific remarks before the application can be sent back
- Officer is notified immediately when an application is sent back
- Application returns to the officer's active queue

User Story: As a manager, I want to see a chronological timeline of all actions taken on a loan application so that I understand the full decision history before acting.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view a complete timeline of all actions taken on an application
- Timeline shows each action, who performed it, and when
- Timeline is shown in chronological order
- Timeline cannot be edited or deleted by any user

User Story: As a manager, I want to see my branch's key portfolio metrics on a single dashboard so that I can monitor overall health at a glance every day.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view key portfolio metrics for their branch on one dashboard
- Dashboard shows metrics such as total disbursed amount, active loans, and NPA ratio
- Dashboard reflects the manager's own branch by default
- Manager can tap any metric to view the related detailed list

User Story: As a manager, I want to filter the portfolio dashboard by officer, branch, or loan product so that I can isolate performance on different basis.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can filter the portfolio dashboard by officer, branch, or loan product
- Manager can apply more than one filter at the same time
- Dashboard updates instantly when a filter is applied
- Manager can clear all filters in a single action

User Story: As a manager, I want to see collection efficiency trend across the past months so that I can spot deteriorating repayment patterns before they become NPAs.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view the collection efficiency trend over the past several months
- Trend respects any filters currently applied on the dashboard
- A noticeable decline in collection efficiency is clearly highlighted
- Manager can use this trend to identify accounts at risk of becoming NPAs

User Story: As a manager, I want to see all my approved loans that have not yet been disbursed so that I can process them in order.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view all approved loans that have not yet been disbursed
- List shows the approved amount and how long the loan has been waiting
- Oldest approved loans are shown first
- Tapping an entry takes the manager directly into the disbursement flow

User Story: As a manager, I want to verify the borrower's bank account number and IFSC before disbursing so that the loan reaches the correct account.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view the borrower's bank account number and IFSC code before disbursing
- System validates the IFSC code before allowing disbursement to proceed
- Manager cannot proceed with disbursement if the bank details are invalid or unverified
- System clearly shows an error if the verification fails

User Story: As a manager, I want to see the full generated EMI schedule for a disbursed loan so that I can verify the amortisation is correct before the borrower's first payment.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view the complete EMI schedule generated for a disbursed loan
- Schedule shows every instalment with due date and amount
- Manager can verify the schedule before the borrower's first payment is due
- Schedule is shown as read-only and cannot be edited from this screen

User Story: As a manager, I want to see all overdue loans tiered by severity so that I can prioritise the most critical accounts first.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view all overdue loans grouped by severity
- Overdue loans are tiered based on how many days they have been overdue
- Most critical accounts are clearly highlighted at the top
- Manager can sort the list by days overdue or by outstanding amount

User Story: As a manager, I want to review the full overdue loan detail and all prior contact history so that I can choose the right resolution path with full context.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can view the full details of an overdue loan in one place
- Manager can view all prior contact history logged for that loan
- Manager can log a new contact attempt directly from this screen
- Contact history remains visible regardless of what resolution is chosen later

User Story: As a manager, I want to restructure an NPA loan so that the borrower can resume repayment on achievable terms in case of any grievance.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can restructure an NPA loan by setting a revised tenure and/or interest rate
- Manager can choose to waive part or all of the pending penalty
- System regenerates the EMI schedule based on the new terms
- Loan status updates to Restructured once confirmed

User Story: As a manager, I want to write off an NPA loan with a mandatory reason so that it is removed from the active portfolio and permanently recorded for audit and regulatory purposes.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can write off an NPA loan
- System requires a reason before the write-off can be confirmed
- Written-off loan is removed from the active portfolio
- Action is recorded permanently and cannot be reversed from the app

User Story: As a manager, I want to escalate an NPA loan to admin with a reason so that cases requiring legal action or regulatory handling can be properly routed.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can escalate an NPA loan to the admin
- System requires a reason before the escalation can be submitted
- Admin is notified immediately when a loan is escalated
- Escalated loan is clearly marked as awaiting admin action

User Story: As a manager, I want to generate a portfolio, repayment trend, or NPA report for a selected date range and filter so that I can review branch performance data before sharing it.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can generate a portfolio, repayment trend, or NPA report
- Manager can select a specific date range and apply filters before generating
- Report preview matches exactly what was selected
- Manager sees a loading indicator while the report is being generated

User Story: As a manager, I want to export a generated report so that I can share it with stakeholders.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can export a generated report as a PDF or CSV file
- Exported file matches exactly what was shown in the report preview
- Manager can share the exported file outside the app
- System shows an error if the export fails

User Story: As a manager, I want to update the interest rate and processing fee and other parameters for a loan product so that our pricing reflects current branch policy.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can update the interest rate, processing fee, and other parameters for a loan product
- System only allows changes within the limits set by the admin
- Updated parameters apply only to new applications, not existing loans
- All changes are recorded for audit purposes

User Story: As a manager, I want to send an in-app message to a loan officer regarding their application so that I can request clarification or communicate a decision detail directly.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Manager can send a message to a loan officer about a specific application
- Officer is notified when a new message is received
- Message is linked to the relevant loan application
- Manager can view the full message history with the officer

User Story: As an admin, I want to log in to the app so that I can access administrative functions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can log in using their employee credentials
- System grants access only to the features and data permitted for the admin role
- System shows an error for incorrect login credentials
- Admin is logged out automatically after a defined period of inactivity

User Story: As an admin, I want to reset my password so that I can regain access to the system.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can request a password reset from the login screen
- System sends an OTP to the registered contact for verification
- Admin can set a new password that meets the minimum security requirements
- All other active sessions are logged out after a successful reset

User Story: As an admin, I want to view a loan activity dashboard so that I can monitor system-wide activity.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can view a real-time dashboard of loan activity across all branches
- Dashboard shows counts of total, pending, approved, rejected, and disbursed applications
- Dashboard updates automatically without manual refresh
- Admin can tap any count to view the related filtered list

User Story: As an admin, I want to manage staff accounts and permissions so that employee access to the system is properly controlled.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can view a list of all staff accounts
- Admin can create a new staff account with name, role, and branch
- Admin can edit an existing staff member's details
- Admin can activate or deactivate a staff account
- Deactivating an account immediately revokes that user's access

User Story: As an admin, I want to assign or change staff roles so that permissions match job responsibilities.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can assign or change the role on any staff account
- Role change takes effect immediately for that staff member
- Staff member's permissions update without needing to log out and back in
- Role changes are recorded for audit purposes

User Story: As an admin, I want to view a borrower's complete profile so that I can access all customer information.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can search for and view any borrower's complete profile
- Profile includes KYC status, credit history, and full loan history
- Admin can search by name, phone number, or borrower ID
- Profile is shown as read-only from this screen

User Story: As an admin, I want to create and update a loan product so that new products can be offered.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can create a new loan product with type, interest rate, fees, and tenure/amount limits
- Admin can update the details of an existing loan product
- New or updated products are available to borrowers immediately once activated
- Changes do not affect loans that are already disbursed

User Story: As an admin, I want to define and edit loan eligibility criteria so that only qualified borrowers can apply.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can define eligibility criteria for a loan product
- Criteria can include minimum income, credit score, age, and employment tenure
- System rejects invalid criteria, such as a minimum higher than the maximum
- Updated criteria apply only to new applications going forward

User Story: As an admin, I want to create and edit notification templates so that system communications remain consistent.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can create and edit notification templates for system events
- Templates can include placeholders such as borrower name, amount, and due date
- Saved templates apply to all future notifications of that event immediately
- System prevents saving a template with broken or invalid placeholders

User Story: As an admin, I want to view the audit trail so that I can track system activity.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can view a complete audit trail of actions performed across all roles
- Each entry shows the actor, the action taken, and when it occurred
- Audit trail is read-only and cannot be edited or deleted
- Audit trail loads smoothly even with a large volume of records

User Story: As an admin, I want to configure and update the required document checklist for each loan type so that borrowers and officers always know exactly which documents must be submitted for a specific loan product.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin can define the required document checklist for each loan type
- Admin can mark each document as mandatory or optional
- Checklist changes apply immediately to new loan applications
- Borrowers and officers always see the most current checklist for a loan type
